sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71858" key="custh/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξυστ-ήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71858.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for scraping</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ξ.,</foreign> dentist's <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for scaling</tr_> teeth, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
